title: lirianthe liliifera var. singapurensis
intro: Lirianthe liliifera var. singapurensis is a plant species, also known as the Singapore lilyturf, a type of low-growing, flowering grass native to Southeast Asia. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lirianthe liliifera var. singapurensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from fever and pain. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional medicine practices in Southeast Asia.
